basic_details.job_title: IIT Jammu Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu (IIT Jammu)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu (IIT Jammu) Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on 12 June 2026 on the official website www.iitjammu.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Jammu Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. Physics with at least 60% marks
qualification.details: M.Sc. Physics with at least 60% marks

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Jammu Technical Assistant Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 29-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Jammu to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Jammu Technical Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Jammu Technical Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the IIT Jammu Technical Assistant recruitment is 29th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Technical Assistant post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the Technical Assistant post is M.Sc. Physics with at least 60% marks. Ensure you meet this criterion before proceeding with the application.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Technical Assistant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Technical Assistant position is 35 years. Please check the official notification for any age relaxation applicable to specific categories.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Technical Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Technical Assistant role will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 29,000 to Rs. 35,000 per month, as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Technical Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Technical Assistant post at IIT Jammu through this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is strictly online. Candidates need to visit the official application portal to submit their applications.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the IIT Jammu Technical Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the official notification, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Technical Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Technical Assistant post will involve an Interview and a Trade Test. Candidates need to perform well in both stages.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for this Technical Assistant position is Contractual. This means the appointment will be for a fixed tenure.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and the apply online link in the "Important Links" section of this article. The official website is also provided there for your reference.
